tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads a file from the local filesystem and returns its contents.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Lists all files and subdirectories in the given directory.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Makes an HTTP GET request to the specified URL and returns the response.

tools.name: post_data
tools.description: Sends an HTTP POST request with the provided data to the specified endpoint.
